statusLine.command: input=$(cat); dir=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.workspace.current_dir'); model=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.model.display_name'); remaining=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.context_window.remaining_percentage // empty'); printf '%s | %s' "$dir" "$model"; [ -n "$remaining" ] && printf ' | Context: %.0f%% remaining' "$remaining"; echo
